sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results(
		$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT * 
		FROM $wpdb->options 
		WHERE option_name LIKE %s 
		OR option_name LIKE %s",
			$search,
			$_search
		),
		ARRAY_A
	)
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT * FROM $wpdb->postmeta WHERE post_id = %d AND meta_key LIKE %s", $ofg->ID, 'field_%' ), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results(
		$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT * 
		FROM $wpdb->options 
		WHERE option_name LIKE %s 
		OR option_name LIKE %s",
			$search,
			$_search
		),
		ARRAY_A
	)

$wpdb->get_row(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}icl_translations WHERE element_type=%s AND element_id=%d",
					'post_acf',
					$ofg->ID
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->get_row(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}icl_translations WHERE element_type=%s AND element_id=%d",
					'post_acf-field-group',
					$field_group['ID']
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

printf( '
?
', esc_attr( $instructions ) )

$wpdb->get_results(
		$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT * 
		FROM $wpdb->options 
		WHERE option_name LIKE %s 
		OR option_name LIKE %s",
			$search,
			$_search
		),
		ARRAY_A
	)

printf(
								'<%s class="%s" data-colname="%s">',
								esc_attr( $el ),
								esc_attr( $classes ),
								esc_attr( $column_label )
							)

printf( '
%s
', esc_attr( $notice_type ), $is_dismissible ? 'is-dismissible' : '', $is_persisted ? 'true' : 'false', esc_attr( md5( $notice_text ) ), acf_esc_html( wpautop( acf_punctify( $notice_text ) ) ) )
printf( '%s', esc_url( admin_url( 'post.php?action=edit&post=' . $field_group['ID'] ) ), esc_html( number_format_i18n( $field_count ) ) )
printf( '%s', esc_url( admin_url( 'edit.php?post_type=' . $post_type['post_type'] ) ), esc_html( number_format_i18n( $num_posts ) ) )
printf( '%s', esc_url( admin_url( 'edit-tags.php?taxonomy=' . $taxonomy['taxonomy'] ) ), esc_html( number_format_i18n( $num_terms ) ) )
printf( '%3$s', esc_url( admin_url( $post_new_file ) ), esc_attr( $class ), esc_html( $post_type_object->labels->add_new ) )
printf( esc_html__( 'The following sites require a DB upgrade. Check the ones you want to update and then click %s.', 'acf' ), '"' . esc_html__( 'Upgrade Sites', 'acf' ) . '"' )
printf( esc_attr__( 'Upgrading data to version %s', 'acf' ), esc_attr( ACF_VERSION ) )

$wpdb->query(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"DELETE FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name LIKE %s OR option_name LIKE %s",
					$search,
					$_search
				)
			)
$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT * FROM $wpdb->postmeta WHERE post_id = %d AND meta_key LIKE %s", $ofg->ID, 'field_%' ), ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->get_results(
		$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT * 
		FROM $wpdb->options 
		WHERE option_name LIKE %s 
		OR option_name LIKE %s",
			$search,
			$_search
		),
		ARRAY_A
	)

$wpdb->get_row(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}icl_translations WHERE element_type=%s AND element_id=%d",
					'post_acf',
					$ofg->ID
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->get_row(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}icl_translations WHERE element_type=%s AND element_id=%d",
					'post_acf-field-group',
					$field_group['ID']
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)
